title: themistoclesia anfracta
intro: Themistoclesia anfracta, also known as 'False Tarragon', is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Themistoclesia anfracta include its potential use in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation.
